assertions.description: navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia is a function, the entry point for echoCancellationMode constraints.
MediaDevices.getSupportedConstraints lists echoCancellation, the constraint whose value range this feature extends.
applyConstraints accepts a string value for echoCancellation (the spec widens the type from boolean to include 'all' and 'remote-only').
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const t=new MediaStreamTrackProcessor; return false;}catch(_){} return typeof MediaStreamTrack==='function';})()

assertions.description: MediaStreamTrack.prototype.applyConstraints exists, the runtime path for switching echoCancellationMode after grant.
MediaStreamTrack.prototype.getSettings exposes the negotiated settings dictionary, where echoCancellationMode surfaces back to the page.
navigator.permissions.query is callable for the microphone descriptor, used to gate constraint application.
